content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

December 15, 1988


Judith A. Malfatti
City Clerk
City of Burlingame
City Hall
501 Primrose Road
Burlingame, CA 94010

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. I-88-431

Dear Ms. Malfatti:

This is in response to your request for advice regarding
Proposition 73's prohibition on use of public funds for
election purposes, and its application to ballot pamphlets.

QUESTION

Must proponents of initiative measures bear the cost of
election statements disseminated by local governments to the
local electorate?

ANALYSIS AND CONCLUSION

The various provisions of Proposition 73, which was adopted
by the voters in the June 1988 statewide primary election,
affect only campaigns and candidates for elective office. For
example, Section 85300 provides that no public officer shall
expend, and no candidate shall accept any public moneys for the
purpose of seeking elective office. Thus, the restrictions and
prohibitions enacted through Proposition 73 do not impact upon
ballot measure campaigns, and proponents of such measures are
not required under the Political Reform Act, to bear the cost
of election statements.1/

1/ The Commission presently has under consideration the
question of whether Proposition 73 prohibits local jurisdiction
from expending public funds for candidate statements. No final
position has been taken on this issue as of this writing.


428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

Judith A. Malfatti
December 15, 1988
Page 2


     I hope this responds adequately to your concern.  If you
have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5901.

                                   Sincerely,

                                   Diane M. Griffiths
                                   General Counsel


                              By:  Lilly Spitz
                                   Counsel, Legal Division

DMG:LS:plph

FPPC

Nov 9 8:10 AM '88

The City of Burlingame

CITY HALL - 501 PRIMROSE ROAD
BURLINGAME, CALIFORNIA 94010

TEL:(415) 342-8931

Frank J. Pagliaro Jr., Mayor
Irving S. Amstrup, Vice Mayor
Gloria H. Barton
Donald P. Lembi
Victor A. Mangini


November 7, 1988


FPPC
428 J Street, 800
Sacramento CA 95814

I understand that under Proposition 73 candidates must
bear the cost of election statements. Under this same
proposition, must proponents of initiative measures
bear the cost of election statements?

Sincerely,

Judith A. Malfatti
City Clerk

28-421

Sincerely,

Judith A. Malfatti
City Clerk
